name: Green Tea

pros.title: catechin content adds real upside
pros.explanation: That gives it a useful compound story beyond the near-empty nutrition label.

pros.title: strong polyphenol reputation
pros.explanation: The core appeal of green tea lives in its compounds and effects rather than classic nutrition composition.

pros.title: nearly zero-calorie daily use
pros.explanation: A huge practical advantage in a category judged more by effect than macros.

cons.title: taste can be a barrier
cons.explanation: Not everyone enjoys it enough to use consistently.

cons.title: quality varies by source
cons.explanation: The practical value depends somewhat on the product.

cons.title: can be a bit fussier than grab-and-go drinks
cons.explanation: A tiny practical downside, but not a serious one.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
This misc example is judged mostly by context/effects rather than composition.
